notes: Jumu'ah Salaah will be at 1.00pm; from 29th March onwards Jumu'ah Salaah will be at 1.30pm. Programmes: Mon: Dars of Quran after Esha; Sun: Inspirations after Zohr; Thu: Durood program after Esha; Fri: Weekly dars of Hadeeth after Fajr; 2nd Sunday of the month: Programme for Women after Zohr. Summer Time Starts Sunday 29th March 2026 - put clocks one hour forward. Jama'at times are subject to change, therefore you are requested to check at the masjid. No separate Maghrib Jama'at column present.
